questions.question: How many of every six Canadian adults surveyed in 1998 knew that the Mackenzie was the country's longest river?
What 1996 movie was hyped: "It Will Blow Audiences Right Out of the Theater"?
What was 7-year-old Jessica Dubroff behind the controls of when she died in 1996?
Who invented the mechanism that rotated a revolver's cylinder automatically when the hammer was cocked?
What former L.A. Dodgers southpaw autographed yarmulkes that fetched $75 each in 1995?
What beetle was celebrated in a nursery rhyme after farmers noticed its ability to consume crop-destroying insects?
